nasb.text: I will whistle for them to gather them together, For I have redeemed them; And they will be as numerous as they were before.

esv.text: “I will whistle for them and gather them in, for I have redeemed them, and they shall be as many as they were before.

cnv.text: 我要向他們吹哨子，招聚他們， 因為我救贖了他們。 他們的人數要增多，像從前一樣。

ccb.text: “我必吹哨聚集他们， 因为我救赎了他们， 他们必像从前一样人数众多。
